nasb.text: The name of the Midianite woman who was slain was Cozbi the daughter of Zur, who was head of the people of a father’s household in Midian.

esv.text: And the name of the Midianite woman who was killed was Cozbi the daughter of Zur, who was the tribal head of a father’s house in Midian.

cnv.text: 那被殺的米甸女子，名叫哥斯比，是蘇珥的女兒；這蘇珥是米甸一個家族的族長。

ccb.text: 被杀的米甸女子名叫哥斯比，她父亲苏珥是米甸人的一个族长。
